item.text: Who is the only Leeds United player to have won the Golden Boot award as top scorer in a Premier League season?
Which Disney song features the lyric 'It's enough to make kings and vagabonds/Believe the very best'?
item.answer_text: Can You Feel The Love Tonight? (by Elton John)
item.long_answer: Can You Feel The Love Tonight? (by Elton John)

item.text: Who became a Dame in the 2005 New Year honours list after winning two gold medals at the Athens Olympics?
Where in the human body is the fovea centralis?
Which Teletubby is slightly larger than the other three?
Which of these is the correct name of the protagonist in the popular 'Monkey Island' video game series from the '90s?
Lhasa, after which the Lhasa Apso dog breed is named, is the capital of what Asian region?

Also receiving a humanitarian visa from Poland, the Olympic sprinter Kristina Timanovskaya was recently given police protection in Tokyo after saying she was taken to the airport against her will by her country's team officials. What country is she from?
Rearrange these words to make the title of a 1950s American novel, followed by the name of the author
item.answer_text: Catcher in the Rye - J D Salinger
item.long_answer: Catcher in the Rye - J D Salinger

item.text: 'Yellowbelly' is a term given to people born and bred in which English county?
What would a young bobbed-haired woman in the 1920's who acted boldly whilst listening to jazz music and wearing short skirts be referred to as?
Based on the geometric phenomenon known as "roulette curves", what was the name of the popular drawing toy, which was a Christmas bestseller throughout the late '60s and '70s?
A free-range chicken bred for meat must be kept outdoors for a minimum of how many hours per day in the UK to be classed as free-range?
A year after leaving the club, which legendary footballer staved off retirement to rejoin Juventus ahead of the current season?
What film does this line come from: "Man who catch fly with chopstick accomplish anything"?
Which TV character's classic lines include "time's fun when you're having flies" and "it's not easy being green"?
Los Angeles stands on the edge of what desert?
In what year did Netherlands become the first country in the world to legalise same-sex marriage; the Gameboy Advance was released to the general public; and Zoolander was at the cinema?
In which country would you find the Cambrian mountains?
Which of the following Monopoly pieces did Hasbro introduce in early 2017?
